nodes.context: White supremacist, Neo-Nazi prison gang in U.S. correctional facilities.
White supremacist prison gang that shifted focus to religion in the 1980s.
White supremacist prison gang that fought a war with the Aryan Circle in the mid-1990s.

edges.evidence_quote: The Aryan Circle was founded by Mark "Cowboy" Gaspard in 1985 in the Texas Department of Corrections as a splinter group of the Aryan Brotherhood of Texas (ABT).
edges.context: Aryan Circle split from Aryan Brotherhood of Texas as a splinter group.

edges.evidence_quote: in the mid-1990s it was caught up in a bloody war with another white supremacist prison gang called the White Knights that cost the life of one White Knights member.
edges.context: Aryan Circle fought a war with White Knights in the mid-1990s.
Infobox lists Aryan Brotherhood of Texas as a rival.
